description: Sprint velocity is below planned (70% achieved), milestone delayed by 7 days, and resource constraints (2 developers on leave, partial QA allocation) compounded by skill gap for Third-party Payer API, increasing risk of delivery slippage for integration.
mitigation: Re-prioritize backlog, onboard SME for Third-party Payer API, increase QA allocation, and add buffer sprint.

description: Critical defects (Sev 1: 3, Sev 2: 10) with 20% upward trend and high concentration in Third-party Integration module, including incorrect payment calculation and eligibility validation issues, risk defect leakage to UAT and production.
mitigation: Initiate root cause analysis, strengthen QA coverage, prioritize defect resolution in integration module.

description: External dependency on Third-party Payer API causing response delays and inconsistent data; internal dependencies include infra team (frequent downtime) and business team pending clarification on payment rules, risking integration and payment accuracy.
mitigation: Engage API provider for SLA, escalate infra downtime, and expedite business clarifications.

description: Batch jobs failing intermittently during night runs, test environment delayed by 2 days, and manual intervention required for claim reprocessing, increasing operational risk and potential for processing errors.
mitigation: Automate claim reprocessing, stabilize batch jobs, and improve environment availability.

description: HIPAA compliance validation pending for new API and incomplete data masking in lower environments, risking regulatory breach and exposure of sensitive data.
mitigation: Complete HIPAA validation and implement full data masking in all environments before production release.
